raw.summary: The code has severe security and functional flaws. The `secure_hash` function uses PBKDF2 but returns a bytes object, not a hex string, and the `authenticate_user` method calls `.hexdigest()` on it which will fail (AttributeError). Password verification is broken: it generates a new random salt instead of retrieving the stored salt, so authentication never succeeds. The class does not import or inherit from `http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler` or any base class, so it cannot serve HTTP. Profile view (GET /profile), profile edit (POST /profile/edit), and admin profile view (GET /profile/<user_id>) endpoints are missing entirely. Authorization logic is incorrect (profile edit requires admin role instead of owner role). The code will not run as-is.
